name: Spicy Marinated Shrimp and Garlic
recipeIngredient: 30 Cloves Garlic, Peeled ( Parboil and peel the garlic first)
recipeInstructions:
1. Peel and parboil 30 cloves of garlic.
2. Heat olive oil in a wide, heavy skillet over low heat.
3. Add lemon juice, pepper, Worcestershire sauce, peeled garlic, rosemary, cayenne pepper, and tabasco sauce to the skillet.
4. Stir gently for 15 minutes until all ingredients are well combined.
5. Remove from heat and stir in shrimp (about 1 1/2 lbs or 20 pieces).
6. Cook the shrimp on low heat, tossing them constantly in hot oil, until they turn pink and begin to curl. Do not overcook.
7. Transfer the mixture to a bowl, cover, and refrigerate for at least one day.
8. Sprinkle with chopped parsley before serving.
